titleStmt.title: SII 37.454: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 454. (A.R. No. B 11 of 1942-43.) Dēvanūru, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab setup near the Śivalaya in the village.
This is dated in Śaka 1491, Śukla, Āshāda śu. 12, corresponding to 1569 A.D., June 25, Saturday.

Damaged. It seems to register the sarvamānya gift of the agrahāra village Raṁgamāmbāpura to a Brāhmaṇa (name not clear) who was the son of Anantayya and who belonged to the Kāsyapa-gōtra Āpastambha-sūtra and Yajuś-śakha by Ramgaparājayyaḍēva Mahārāju, son of Veṁkaṭādrirājayya and grandson of Rāmarāju-śriraṅgarājayya of the Āravīḍu family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁga siśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkya
nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 1491 Agunēṭi śukla saṁvatsara
Āṣāḍha śu 12 lu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīrasadāśiva mahārāyalugāru ra
tnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁcēyucuṁḍagānu Ā
trēyasagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulai
na sōmavaṁśōdbhavulaina Āravīṭi rāmarāju śrī raṁgarājayya
pautṛlaina veṁkaṭādri rājayya putṛlaina raṁgapa rājayyadēvamahā
rājulugāru kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuḥ
śākhādhyāyulaina vēdirāju pautṛlayina Anaṁtta
yyagāri putṛlaina yyagāriki [Iccina] dha¨rmaśilāśāsana
dāniki pāliṁccina ganisīma
lōni raṁgamāṁbāpuraṁ sa¨rvamānya A
grahāraṁ prathamadvādaśi puṇyakāla
maṁdu sahiraṇyōdaka dānadhārāpū¨rvakaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rka
sthāyigānu dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ ya mahāyōgyamaunaṭugānu mī
putrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu nuṁ catussīmaku
lōnaina nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi siddha sā
dhyaṁbulu Aneḍi Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmyataluṁnu suṁ
kasthāvarālu puṇyaṁgā dhārabōsi
Istimī . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ pa
radattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . śrī śrī śrī
lōkappagāru māyajaśānakuṁ koṁna dhēnimi
di maṁgaḷaganasa nūrukuṁṭala pramāṇāna reṁḍu puṭluṁnu Þ2 vari
maḍi vūḍeṁḷāṁ migilina grāmaṁ gaṇa vrittu
lu Þ0 nu mā lu prakōṁnnavritu mi
gilina vritu¨rluṁ ku Ācā¨ryyulaku Āyigārlaku
modalainavārki Istimi . gāna Anubhaviṁcēdi
